summary: Record the owner's SVG parity, public WASM compliance, and Windows-first public-beta decisions without claiming their follow-up evidence gates have already passed.

decisions.decision: Canonical SVG comparison may convert only CRLF to LF before comparing and hashing, while the original native and WASM artifacts, raw lengths, and raw hashes remain retained.
decisions.rationale: The observed native/WASM difference is platform line-ending representation; retaining raw evidence preserves auditability while the narrowly approved canonical form tests the intended SVG bytes without authorizing semantic fallback.

decisions.decision: Public distribution of the pinned OpenSCAD WASM pair is approved only with its exact corresponding official source, applicable GPL-2.0-or-later materials, reproducible build recipe, and artifact/source checksums.
decisions.rationale: The conservative package keeps the distributed engine bytes tied to their exact source and reproducible provenance while preserving ScadMill's separate product boundary.

decisions.decision: Target Windows desktop 0.1.0-beta.1 as the first public beta; defer macOS and Linux release proof without cutting either platform or any capability from the complete M0-M6 product commitment.
decisions.rationale: A Windows-first beta narrows the immediate publication proof while preserving the accepted complete-product scope and later cross-platform delivery.

questions: Q-0033 and Q-0034 are resolved; their approved implementation/evidence follow-ups remain fail-closed until verified.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
